phoneticUs: 藢n蓱藧nr瑟藞k蓽藧r瑟艐; 藢n蓱藧nr瑟藞k蕦r瑟艐
examples: "We have decreased the reliance on nonrecurring revenue, " said Kevin Roberts, a spokesman for Mr. Christie.
McDonald's is trading at 18 times trailing earnings, if you exclude the nonrecurring items.
Organic revenue, when currency fluctuations and other nonrecurring events are not included, grew by 27 percent.
